rationale: Elec. Code §258.005 governs printing of Fair Campaign Practice forms; it is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict.
quote: The commission shall print copies of the Code of Fair Campaign Practices and shall supply the forms to the authorities with whom copies of the code may be filed in quantities and at times requested by the authorities.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to proposed change; no conflict exists.
